task: Audit roadmap and completed-epic truth after Epic 06
acceptance_criteria: Repo truth confirms whether any existing roadmap epic remains unfinished
validation_command: bash -lc \grep -q 'Epic 06 已完成' .codex-tasks/20260420-tenant-governance-epic/PROGRESS.md && grep -q 'Epic 05 `Multi-Engine Expansion and Abstraction Validation` 已完成' .codex-tasks/20260420-multi-engine-validation-epic/PROGRESS.md\""
notes: Confirmed roadmap epics 01-06 are all already closed in this repo, so there is no remaining pre-defined future epic to activate

task: Write post-Epic-06 close-out review and choose the next-stage direction
acceptance_criteria: Close-out review explicitly records what Epic 06 proved, what it did not prove, and why the next-stage direction is chosen
validation_command: bash -lc \grep -q 'Close-Out Review' .codex-tasks/20260420-post-epic06-transition-review/PROGRESS.md && grep -q 'Oracle Data Plane and Minimum Insights' .codex-tasks/20260420-post-epic06-transition-review/PROGRESS.md\""
notes: Selected Oracle data-plane continuation because Epic 05 and current UI/task docs explicitly preserve Oracle as validation-only while MySQL path remains green

task: Extend roadmap and materialize the new epic skeleton
acceptance_criteria: Updated roadmap and fully materialized next-stage epic parent/child skeleton exist on disk
validation_command: bash -lc \grep -q 'Oracle Data Plane and Minimum Insights' EPIC_ROADMAP.md && test -f .codex-tasks/20260420-oracle-data-plane-epic/EPIC.md && test -f .codex-tasks/20260420-oracle-data-plane-epic/SUBTASKS.csv && test -f .codex-tasks/20260420-oracle-data-plane-epic/PROGRESS.md\""
notes: Roadmap now includes a post-phase-one Oracle data-plane continuation, and the new epic skeleton is fully materialized before child implementation
